name: atomr-infer
description: Skills and plugins for working on projects that depend on atomr-infer, the multi-runtime GPU + remote inference layer for the atomr actor runtime.

plugins.name: atomr-infer-ai-skills
plugins.description: Skills for AI coding assistants working on projects that depend on atomr-infer — quickstart, runtime selection, remote providers, hybrid pipelines, deployment, troubleshooting, and adding new backends.
